issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (When Attacking), not 'Activated'. 'Activated' is for abilities you choose to use; 'OnAttack' is for automatic triggers when the card attacks.
Missing required condition 'LeaderHasType' to check if Leader has {Drum Kingdom} type. Current condition only checks for resting DON but ignores the Leader type requirement.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x2] [When Attacking] If your Leader has the {Drum Kingdom} type, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 4000 power or less.
